title: nuphar × rubrodisca
intro: Nuphar × rubrodisca, a hybrid aquatic plant, is a cross between the Yellow Water Lily (Nuphar lutea) and the Red Water Lily (Brassenia rubrodisca), also known as Yellow Flag and Red Flag respectively, however it is more commonly known as Red Water Lily. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nuphar × rubrodisca include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
